title: WIPO Workforce 2025: December Edition
content: WIPO’s workforce is the human capital of the Organization and its greatest asset. This brochure shows a detailed picture of staffing at WIPO in 2025.
snippet: WIPO’s workforce is the human capital of the Organization and its greatest asset. This brochure shows a detailed picture of staffing at WIPO in 2025.
sourceDescription: The WIPO RSS newsfeed provides access to the digital versions of our publications, studies and information products.
